violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to clean and sanitize ice machine. Establishment is to send photos of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH CFP. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door produce cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay. Establishment is to purchase Chlorine Sanitizing solution test strips. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Establishment is to purchase high temperature indicating labels for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet rooms is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The downstairs bar is lacking a handwashing sink. A handwashing sink must be accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment to send photo of hands sink installed to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Shellfish was observed in the kitchen without tags, shellfish was left out on the counter and was out of temperature. Through interview with PIC it was determined that the shellfish belonged to members and came from an unapproved source. Shellfish were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The door to the outside, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
